misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu, a competitor who has graced the Hector Trophée on three occasions, stands as a past champion of the main team event. While his competitive journey within the tournament has concluded, his single triumph in the pair format marks a significant achievement in its history.

Over his three engagements with the Hector Trophée, Panu demonstrated a capacity for strategic team play that culminated in lifting the esteemed main trophy. This victory highlights his ability to forge a winning partnership. The individual Victor Trophy, however, remained an objective unfulfilled during his time in the event.

Panu's approach to the game was characterized by a deeply contemplative style. Known for meticulously assessing his options and taking a considerable amount of time before executing each shot, his deliberate pace was a hallmark of his presence on the course. This methodical concentration, though at times extending the tempo of play, undoubtedly contributed to his strategic insights and eventual team success.

Having stepped away from active competition in Hector events, Panu will not be among the field for the Hector Trophée 2026. His memorable victory and unique playing style ensure his contribution remains a distinct part of the tournament's unfolding narrative.
